//: Capstone-only tsconfig (Definition of Done). Typechecks types-consumer.capstone.ts against the BUILT package via its `exports` map under bundler resolution. It deliberately does NOT inherit the root `paths` alias (which maps @deepnote/* to package source index.ts and cannot express the `/types` subpath) — resolution goes through the pnpm node_modules symlink + the package `exports` entry, exactly as a real downstream SPA consumer resolves it.
